name: patchmaster
description: A lightweight VS Code coding agent that creates files, runs checks with confirmation, explains failures, and retries fixes.

patchMaster.openaiApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI API key. If empty, the extension uses the `OPENAI_API_KEY` environment variable.

patchMaster.model.description: Model used for agent planning and file edits.

patchMaster.maxFileChars.description: Maximum active-file characters to send as context.

patchMaster.defaultTestCommand.description: Optional default command for autonomous fix-and-test loops.

patchMaster.maxIterations.description: Maximum autonomous fix attempts before stopping to protect the editor and API usage.
